name: ORourke Electric Inc
tagline: Quality electrical work in the North Bay since 1981
seoDescription: O'Rourke Electric Inc has provided residential, commercial, and industrial electrical work in Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 1981. Licensed, IBEW-trained.

sections.heading: Santa Rosa's electrical contractor since 1981
sections.subheading: Family-run, IBEW-trained electricians serving homes, businesses, and industry across the North Bay.

sections.heading: About O'Rourke Electric
body: Founded in 1981 by Daniel T. O'Rourke and still led by Dan O'Rourke, O'Rourke Electric, Inc. has spent over four decades wiring homes, businesses, and industrial facilities across Santa Rosa and the greater San Francisco North Bay.

The team pairs IBEW Local 551 trained, state-certified electricians with experienced project managers, and is a California Certified Small Business and member of the North Coast Builders Exchange and the National Fire Protection Association.

items.title: Residential Electrical
items.description: Wiring, upgrades, lighting, and repairs for homes throughout the North Bay.

items.title: Commercial Electrical
items.description: Electrical installation and service for offices, retail, and commercial buildings.

items.title: Industrial Electrical
items.description: Power distribution and equipment wiring for industrial and manufacturing facilities.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message ORourke Electric Inc and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: The many times we have had O'Rourke Electric solve our electrical problems, we have had 100% success.
items.author: Karen Derkos

items.quote: O'Rourke Electric Inc is completing a job where I work that required their expertise in providing power to machinery that was consolidated into two areas. They performed admirably.
items.author: Alan Hennessy

sections.heading: Work with ORourke Electric Inc
sections.body: Find us at 3347 Industrial Dr. Call (707) 528-8539 — we’re glad to help.
